name: Esoteric Hermit
description: A recluse who has spent years in isolation studying forbidden and arcane texts. You know things others do not.
classAbility: Starts with one random sacred or unclean scroll. Can identify occult writings and arcane phenomena.
notes: Cannot use scrolls while wearing medium/heavy armor.

name: Fanged Deserter
description: You have survived the wars and fled from them. Your body is scarred, your mind broken, but your teeth are sharp and your jaws strong.
classAbility: Bite attack: d4 damage. Cannot read. Illiterate.

name: Gutterborn Scum
description: An ill-mannered, lowborn wretch with a penchant for dirty tricks, backstabbing, and survival at all costs.
classAbility: Backstab: Test Agility DR10 when attacking an unaware enemy to deal double damage. Agility and Presence tests reduced by 2 DR.

name: Heretical Priest
description: A priest who has turned from the faith to pursue forbidden knowledge and power.
classAbility: May cast powers while wearing medium armor. Blessed: Scrolls you carry cannot be destroyed.
notes: May cast while wearing medium armor.

name: Occult Herbmaster
description: A practitioner of herbal alchemy and potion craft, with knowledge of plants both healing and deadly.
classAbility: Access to decoctions: Roll d6 - gain random herbalist benefit. Can create potions with materials and time.

name: Wretched Royalty
description: Battered royalty, neither combative nor wise, but somehow still alive. Your noble blood commands fear and obedience.
classAbility: Presence DR10: Force a creature of equal or lower HP to obey a simple command. Once per day.
